evidence.summary: Focused regression coverage for mesh status lifecycle including dashboard rebuild output and artifact creation.

evidence.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workflow.py -q -k "doctor_status_and_task_lifecycle or status_skips_dashboard_when_disabled"
evidence.summary: Addressed review feedback by covering both the default rebuild path and the dashboard-disabled path.

evidence.command: uv run pytest tests/test_workflow.py -q -k "doctor_status_and_task_lifecycle or status_skips_dashboard_when_disabled_in_config or status_skip_dashboard_rebuild_flag"
evidence.summary: Covers the default rebuild path, the persistent dashboard-disabled path, and the one-shot status opt-out path after renaming the flag to --skip-dashboard-rebuild.

Added mesh status --no-dashboard, added disabled-dashboard regression coverage, and replaced the PR description with rationale, validation, and behavior notes. Kept rebuild-on-status as the default because it is the task contract; the new flag is the escape hatch.
Renamed the one-shot status flag to --skip-dashboard-rebuild to avoid conflict with mesh init --no-dashboard, added a direct test for the one-shot opt-out path, and marked the PR ready for review.
